chunks.text: Technical Reports - Ronald S. Fearing. Evolving Robotic Leg Shapes via Deep Reinforcement Learning (EECS-2020-103) Hayden Sheung. Design of a Two-Wheeled Mars Rover with Sprawl Ability and Metal Brush Traction (EECS-2019-145) Ivan Davydychev. Thin-Film Electrostatic Actuators and Adhesives for High-Voltage Robotics (EECS-2018-58) Ethan Schaler.

Collaborative, Contact-based Schemas for Robot Righting utilizing Hull Shape Design (EECS-2017-206) David McPherson. Force Sensing Shell using a Planar Sensor for Miniature Legged Robots (EECS-2016-26) Joshua D. Goldberg and Ronald S. Fearing. Tactile Sensors for Palm-Size Crawling Robots (EECS-2014-40) Jaakko Karras.

Flight Simulation of an Ornithopter (EECS-2013-60) Cameron Rose and Ronald S. Fearing. Reinforcement Learning Methods to Enable Automatic Tuning of Legged Robots (EECS-2012-145) Mallory Tayson-Frederick. Reinforcement Learning Methods to Enable Automatic Tuning of Legged Robots (EECS-2012-129) Nicolas Zeitlin.

Optical Flow on a Flapping Wing Robot (EECS-2010-96) Fernando Garcia Bermudez. Running with Flapping Wings (EECS-2010-76) Kevin Peterson. Flight Simulation of a 3 gram Autonomous Glider (EECS-2006-80) Jon Perry Entwistle and Ronald S. Fearing.

The Dynamic Response of a Tactile Sensor (M89/138) E.M. Sladek and Ronald S. Fearing. Determining the Axis of a Surface of Revolution Using Tactile Sensing (M89/117) M. Berkemeier and Ronald S. Fearing.
